inputs.label: Risk-Free Rate (%)
inputs.businessContext: Return on risk-free assets (e.g., government bonds).

inputs.label: Market Risk Premium (%)
inputs.businessContext: Excess return of market over risk-free rate.

rules: All numeric inputs must be positive numbers.

suggestedActions: Verify inputs before making financial decisions.
Consult a licensed financial advisor for personalized advice.
